description: Fragment from a private account written by Nahray b. Nissim. 1049. Some details about trades of pearls and beads. This document seems like a draft for the account that Nahray sent to Barhun b. Yitzhak ha-Tāhartī (see: Bodl. MS heb. e 98/64-65, PGPID 603) but that is not correct as the latter was written a few years before this document. In this list writes details about buying flax in Munimun and its shipment to Rashid, and probably from there to Alexandria. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #275) VMR
tags: al-Tahirti, Nahray B. Nissim, flax, trade
description_he: שרידי חשבון פרטי של נהראי בן ניסים, 1049, על עסקי פנינים וחרוזים ועל רכישת פשתן במוניממון ומשלוחו לרשיד
